title: MGN 351 (M) Amendment 1 leadership qualities for safety management
body: "Notice to all owners, operators, masters, officers, manning agents, training institutions, shipping insurers and professional maritime institutions  This notice should be read with leading for safety, MGN 505, MGN 638, MGN 351, MGN 640, the human element - a guide to human behaviour in the shipping industry, and other maritime human element publications and replaces MGN 351 (M) leadership qualities for effective safety management.  This MGN expires 14, May 2026 "
